meta.title: sona pi ma Sonko lon toki pona
meta.description: lipu ni li kulupu lipu pi sona sinpin tan ma Sonko, ante tawa toki pona lon nasin lukin pona.

hero.title: sona pi ma Sonko lon toki pona
hero.subtitle: lipu ni li kulupu lipu pi sona sinpin tan ma Sonko, ante tawa toki pona lon nasin pi lukin pona. sitelen Sonko, toki Inli, toki pona, en nasin sitelen pona-ready li lon poka, tawa lukin sin lon tenpo mute.
hero.note: tenpo ni la lipu tu wan li open. tenpo kama la lipu sin tu li kama.

why.title: tan seme la kulupu ni li pona?

history.title: sona sinpin, lukin sin
history.text: lipu ni li pali ala tawa lukin pi tenpo lili taso. toki pona lili la nasin, ante, en ijo pi kama sin li kama sona pona.

style.title: nasin lukin pi sitelen mute
style.text: sitelen Sonko, toki Inli, toki pona, en nasin sitelen pona-ready li kama lon tomo lukin wan, tawa pona pi kama sona.

europe.title: sona pi pilin sewi kepeken toki lili
europe.text: toki pona li ante ala e sona open. ona li pana e len lili sin tawa lukin e sona sinpin lon nasin ante.

discovery.title: lipu li ijo lukin kin
discovery.text: lipu ni li pali tawa lukin taso ala. sitelen, open pi linja, en nasin tomo lipu li jo e sona sama toki insa.

dao-de-jing.title: Dao De Jing
dao-de-jing.author: jan Losi
dao-de-jing.shortDesc: lipu ni li pona lukin. ona li pana e sitelen Sonko open en toki pona lon nasin pi sitelen pona-ready. open lipu la toki Inli li lon, li pana e sona lili pi nasin ante: seme la ijo sama Dao en De li kama lon toki pona. poka ni la lipu ale li kama sama sitelen tu lon tomo wan.
dao-de-jing.longDesc: ijo insa: toki Inli pi open lipu, sona lili pi anpa lipu ale, sitelen Sonko, toki pona, nasin sitelen pona-ready.
learnMoreParagraphs: lipu ni li pana e sitelen Sonko open, toki pona, en nasin sitelen pona-ready lon tomo wan. open la toki Inli en sona lili pi anpa lipu ale li pana e sona pi nasin ante: seme la sona suli li kama lon toki pona.
lipu suli la anpa lipu ale li kama lon nasin pi tomo tu: sitelen Sonko lon poka wan, toki pona lon poka ante. toki mute pi sona anpa li lili, tan ni: lipu ni li wile e pilin lukin pona en pilin sona.
ona li pona tawa jan pi sona Dao, tawa jan pi kama sona toki pona, en tawa jan pi olin sitelen, olin lipu, olin nasin pali sin.

sunzi.title: Sunzi: The Art of War in toki pona
sunzi.author: jan Sunzi
sunzi.shortDesc: lipu ni li pona tawa jan pi wile sona mute. toki ale li lon nasin tu wan tu: toki Inli, sitelen Sonko, toki pona, en toki pona lon nasin sitelen pona-ready. lipu ni li jo kin e sona lili pi anpa kulupu, tawa sona e nimi suli, nasin ante, en pali pi sona utala lon toki lili.
sunzi.longDesc: ijo insa: toki Inli, sitelen Sonko, toki pona, nasin sitelen pona-ready, sona nimi.
learnMoreParagraphs: lipu ni li jo e nasin tu wan tu tawa sona: toki Inli, sitelen Sonko, toki pona, en toki pona lon nasin sitelen pona-ready. ona li lipu insa pi kulupu Chinese Wisdom in toki pona.

lipu ni li jo kin e sona nimi pi anpa kulupu, tawa pona e sona pi nasin ante, pi nimi sin, en pi wile suli lon lipu Sunzi. ni la jan li ken lukin pona e tenpo, e ma, e len, e tawa, e wawa, e wile lawa.
lipu ni li pali ala tawa lukin pi tenpo lili. ona li pona tawa lukin sin, tawa jan pi sona sinpin Sonko, tawa jan pi kama sona toki pona, en tawa jan pi lukin suli lon sitelen pona.

mozi-universal-love.title: Mozi — Universal Love
mozi-universal-love.author: jan Mozi
mozi-universal-love.shortDesc: lipu ni li open free tawa kulupu lipu Chinese Wisdom in toki pona. ona li jo e toki ante ale pi lipu Universal Love lon nasin pi lukin pona, tawa ni: sina ken sona e nasin lukin en nasin pilin pi kulupu ni.
mozi-universal-love.longDesc: ijo insa: lipu ale, nasin preview pi kulupu, nasin lukin poka.
learnMoreParagraphs: lipu free ni li open e nasin tawa kulupu Chinese Wisdom in toki pona. ona li pana e Universal Love lon nasin pi lukin poka, tawa ni: nasin lukin en nasin sona pi kulupu li kama sona pona.
ona li lipu preview, taso ona li lipu ale kin tawa lukin. nasin lipu li pona tawa lukin sin en tawa sona pona pi toki ante, li pali ala tawa lukin pi tenpo lili taso.
sina pilin pona tan nasin ni la lipu mani lon kulupu li pana e nasin sama lon lipu suli ante.

moreBooks.title: lipu sin lon kulupu ni
moreBooks.subtitle: tenpo kama la lipu sin tu li kama lon kulupu ni, li kama lon tomo ni.

faq.title: sona lili (FAQ)
faq.subtitle: nimi lili pi sona: kulupu lipu, nasin lipu, en nasin lukin.

items.a: ni li kulupu lipu pi sona sinpin tan ma Sonko, ante tawa toki pona lon nasin lukin poka.

items.q: mi wile sona e toki pona mute anu seme?
items.a: ala. toki Inli en sitelen open li pana e pona tawa open, en nasin sama pi lipu li pona tawa kama sona.

items.q: tan seme la toki pona li pona tawa sona sinpin?
items.a: tan ni: nimi lili la nasin pi sona li kama lukin pona. ona li ante e nasin lukin, taso li weka ala e sona open.

items.q: tan seme la sitelen pona li lon?
items.a: ona li pana e nasin lukin sin tawa toki pona, li pana kin e tenpo lili tawa lukin sin.

items.q: lipu ale li free anu seme?
items.a: ala. lipu free wan taso li lon tenpo ni: Mozi — Universal Love.

items.q: lipu sin li kama anu seme?
items.a: lon. tenpo kama la lipu sin li kama lon tomo ni.

items.q: toki ante ni li sama ale anu seme?
items.a: ona li awen pona tawa sona open, taso ona li ante lon nasin toki pona en nasin lukin pi lipu.

items.q: mi ken lukin e sin lon seme?
items.a: o lukin e link lon anpa lipu en lon tomo ni lon tenpo kama.

legal.title: lipu lawa
legal.ipValue: lipu en sitelen ale li tan jan lawa anu li jo e wile.
legal.liabilityValue: sona ni li kama sama ni taso.

privacy.title: nasin len
privacy.dataValue: tomo lipu ni li alasa ala e sona pi jan.
privacy.cookiesValue: kuki pi sona lukin ala. taso sitelen tawa YouTube li ken pana e kuki.
privacy.rightsValue: sina wile sona la, o toki tawa mi.
